assertions.title: The main view renders a combined tree with clear worktree and session hierarchy

steps.action: Run bun test for WorktreeSessionTree component
steps.expected: Tests pass verifying combined tree rendering
buildWorktreeSessionTree correctly groups sessions under worktrees
steps.observed: buildWorktreeSessionTree groups sessions by worktreeId, sorts by createdAt/queuedAt

steps.expected: Worktree nodes show ▼/▶ indicators, session nodes show ◆ with status
steps.observed: WorktreeSessionTree.tsx uses ▼ for expanded worktrees, ◆ for sessions with status descriptions

evidence.testResults: 12/12 WorktreeSessionTree tests pass, tree domain tests all pass

assertions.title: Tree selection drives the active detail pane and focus behavior safely

steps.action: Verify getSelectedSession returns null for worktree selection
steps.expected: getSelectedSession returns null when worktree node selected
steps.observed: Test 'getSelectedSession returns null when worktree node is selected' passes

steps.action: Check Footer component shows different shortcuts based on selection type
steps.expected: Footer omits chat/cancel shortcuts when worktree selected
steps.observed: Footer.test.tsx shows Footer disables Ctrl+C and Enter Focus Chat when selectedNodeType='worktree'

steps.action: Verify App.tsx keyboard shortcuts respect selection type
steps.expected: Ctrl+C only cancels when session selected, Ctrl+L only focuses chat for sessions
steps.observed: App.tsx checks selectedNodeType === 'session' before enabling session-specific shortcuts

evidence.testResults: Footer tests pass showing different shortcut sets for worktree vs session selection

assertions.title: Selection is repaired when the previously active node becomes invalid

steps.action: Verify repairSelection function in tree domain
steps.expected: repairSelection falls back to valid node when selection becomes invalid
steps.observed: 6 repairSelection tests pass covering: valid selection unchanged, null selection, removed session repair, empty tree handling

steps.action: Check App.tsx useEffect for selection repair
steps.expected: useEffect watches worktrees/sessions and calls repairSelection when they change
steps.observed: App.tsx has useEffect with [worktrees, sessions] dependencies that calls repairSelection and updates via selectTreeNode

steps.expected: Tests cover session removal, worktree fallback, empty tree clearing
steps.observed: Tests: 'repairs to first session when selected session is removed', 'repairs to worktree when session removed and no other sessions', 'returns null selection for empty tree'

evidence.keyCode: useEffect in App.tsx: if (repaired.selectedId !== selectedSessionId || repaired.selectedType !== selectedNodeType) { selectTreeNode(...) }

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All tree view and selection behaviors are correctly implemented and tested.

evidence.testOutput: bun test: 155 pass, 0 fail, 310 expect() calls across 19 files

VAL-CREATE-007.tests: WorktreeSessionTree renders worktree nodes, WorktreeSessionTree renders session nodes under worktrees, buildWorktreeSessionTree groups sessions under their parent worktree

VAL-CREATE-008.footer: Footer shows different shortcuts based on selectedNodeType
VAL-CREATE-008.tests: getSelectedSession returns null when worktree node is selected, Footer disables chat/cancel shortcuts when worktree node is selected

VAL-CREATE-010.tests: repairSelection keeps valid selection unchanged, repairSelection repairs to worktree when session removed and no other sessions, repairSelection returns null selection for empty tree
